description.en: The maximum value allowed for the timeout parameter of Lock.acquire. Specifying a timeout greater than this value will raise an OverflowError. Added in version 3.2.

excerpt.es: The maximum value allowed for the timeout parameter of Lock.acquire. Specifying a timeout greater than this value will raise an OverflowError. Added in version 3.2.
